TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Maolin, title = Maolin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maolin} }

S.FORM: Maolin (Hulam a sulit: ŤĆāśěóŚćÄ)a sakuwan ku Kaohsiung. kumud nu kalesakan, 241.39 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 109.93 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 40.14 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 1,896 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 581 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 1,797 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 95%(Rukai) ku kasabinawlan. u Rukai ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasa niyadu Maolin mala 3 a cuwen atu 3 ku niyazu'. tina tulu a niyazu'sa, Teldreka , 'Oponoho , Kungadavane . ŤĆāśěóŚćÄ (Maolin)(ŤĆāśěóť≠ĮŚáĪŤ™ě:Teldreka)u Cunhau-minkuo Takaw nu cacaya a secia niyadu, itida i Takaw wali amisan nu pangkiw a papahan nu wali timulan aniyaduan, amisan miapi tu Tawyun a niyaduan, nutipan sibiyaw tu liwkuy niyaduan , Tawan-sen Pindun-kin Kawsu'sin , waliyan sibiyaw tu Tawan-sen Tadun-kin inpin sen , tmulan mitules tu Tawan-sen Pindun-kin Sandi-min sen , Wutay sen . niyaduay a tademaw cacay a malebut idaw ku siwa (1.9000) a tademawan, u saadidiay nu pulung nu Sesia niyadu'an, u saadidiay nu Tawan subalan nu saadidiay a saka tulu nu sincen niyadu'. Maolin niyadu han u cesiase' nu yungcumin a kitidaan, idaw ku kunfu a tademawan a siidaay nu niyaduay a kapulungan masakaputay, isasa idaw ku Wansan-li , Duna-li , Maulin-li tulu a naniyaduan . likisi Maolin niyaduan u Tawan yungcumin Lukay binacadan Wansan-se , Duna-se , Maya-se aenengan aniyaduan, amisan mIapi tu Mali buyu a Bunun nu binacadan, waliyan miapi tu ilabuay nu Penlu' Bunun a binacadan, timul han u Layaeya a binacadan a Paywan binacadan a niyaduan. mah'ka taytayni ku Dipun , niyaduay a yungcumin caay pakadungdung tu nipikuwan nu Dipun , sisa mapulung ku niyaduay a binacadan a tademaw paculi miwawies tu Dipun , nika amica kuni kayadah nu nipatayan tu kincal nu Dipun , nika u bakan atu pana' caay tu pakademec tu si kuwangay a Dipunan , amica kuni kasikuwan nu Dipun , payniyaduan a yungcimin pacician mikusang. . nina kawaw panganganan nu Dipun u "Tuncei" han, u Tuncei a ngalngal u "Duna" han u niyaduay a ngangan. itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan (1920) a mihcaan a niyaduan misumad mibabenis pabeli tu Takaw-cuo cisan a niyadu' anipikuwan. . hedek a malepacaw uydaan tu ngangan, patidengsa tu Duna niyadu' , i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihcaan na masasedsed tu pulung nu Tawan a nipalumaan tu kilang u sakakaay ku heni, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu (1957) a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad cacay a demian sumaden mala Maolin-sin niyadu' , Maya niyaduan tawya tu misumad tu Maolin niyadu'han . 2010ŚĻī3śúą4śó•śôā, . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan tulu a bulad sepat a demiad sa, Maolin niyadu' an tawya a mihcaan tabaki ku ninel enem tin sepat ku sasulitan nu ninel, u Takaw nikilukan satabakiya nu ninelan. (Ś§öÁīćŤ™ěThakongadavane,Ťź¨ŚĪĪŤ™ě'Oponoho,ŤĆāśěóŤ™ěTeldreka), . nina niyaduay a tademaw u Tawan yungcumin Lukay binacadan ku angangan. nika nina tuluway a niyaduay masasukamu ku heni(Ś§öÁīćŤ™ěThakongadavane,Ťź¨ŚĪĪŤ™ě'Oponoho,ŤĆāśěóŤ™ěTeldreka),nina Lukay binacadan nu tuluay a kamuan patudu' han nu niyaduay a sakalalecad nu kamuwan. idaw ku matatungusay a pakunida hananay nu aidangan, aaidangan atu micidekay nu lalangawan, sihu itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay (2001) a mihcaan sabuw tu tusa a bulad patideng tu tatengaay a Maolin kuociw aidangan a kataydaan, mala Tawan nu saka singanganay a tataydaan nu midangay. babahelan nu kiwan a kulitan nu aipapang masilsilan\y nu nanum Maolin niyaduan itida i Cunyan-sanmay isasa' nu satimulan, talakaw han namaka tusa a lasubu tulu a bataan (230) a kunce katukuh i tusa a malebut pitu a lasubu a pina (2700) nu kunce, demiad nuheni han caay kaw calelesay a demiad atu dihedihekuwan nu kala sapisapian a demiad, Cuko sawac ngangiwngangiw sa kunisilsil pasayda i niyadu' kuni pisilsilan. . talakaw nu buyu a bangcal nu aadihan, picidekan nu masa kimulmulay a enalay nu sasaay a buyu, nu maka pabaway nikahetikan nu silsil a cascas mahida ni pelaan nu kapicidekan a aadihan tu aidangan, yadah ku aadupan atu mahicaay nu kilangkilangan, taneng miadih tu cacay a bataan nu emangay a kiyukiyuwan nu kulitan a adipapang itida i Maolin tepadtepadan nu masahicaay a aadihan tu dihep nu aadihan. hamaw sa muculil i aaidangan, miadih tu mabahelay nu adipapang a kitakit amilakuytay tu kasienawan nu masadihepay a mahicaay nu adipapang aadihan, sisa Maolin angangan u Lukay a binacadan nu niyaduan. . tawyaay a nakamuwan, picidekan nu dihepicay a sasangaan tu luma' a ba'tu, kapahay nalimaan a nisangaan, talakaw bangcal nu mapacacuyay nu kayakay, masa kalimulakan nu lisin, niyaduay a kakanen, micunus tu niyaduay a lalangawan nu tataydaan amidang. aidanganŤßÄŚÖČ aydaay nu Maolin kuociw aaidangan uliyud nida makatukuh i Takaw-se Tawyun kakitidaan, Liwkuy kakitidaan , Maolin kakitidaan atu Pindun-kin Sandi-min-sen , Wu'-tay-sen , Ma-ciw-sen , nina enem a niyadu'an, mahicaay kya wayway nu kitidaan, Wuncun a aaidangan, u kapah sacabayan ku tademaw nu yuncumin, nu masaka caay naming kalecad nu kakawawan, niyadu' a wayway caay namin kalecad ku kakawaw. Takaw Pindun sawac nu pabawan Law-nun sawac , Cuo-ko sawac ka silsilan , milakuyd tu Takaw-se Liu-kuy kitidaan, Maolin kitidaan atu Pin-tun kin Santi-men niyadu' , ilabu nu kitidaan idaw ku Pawlay, Pulaw-wuncun, Luntuo-san, Setuo-san masaadiyucay a masatepaday a enalan nu kitidaan atu sabaw walu a Luohan-santi dadiputan a niyaduan, duma satu idaw kunu Lukay binacadan a lalangawan nu nisangaan tunu dihepicay a ba'tu nu luma' atu aadihan tu mahicaay a nisakakawan tu aadihan atu Liwkuy nikaliwmahan a nilaculan tu " linbu' manggu, malasayadahay nu aaidangan nu kataydaan. Li-na-li aidangan nu papalitaan tu aadihan u luma' nu aaidangan idaw ku papalitaan tu sapipadang tu taydaay, taneng miadih tu kacudu, papacucuwan tu lutungay, aadihan tu cudad atu tinnaw papacucukan tu kainaian nu telay a dingwa nu papacucukan. 85Ś§ßś®ď. nina kitidaan miadih tu Pintun u sahebalay nu bangcalay a kitidaan, taydaay nu midangay a tademaw taneng tapabaw i saka tusa a tunduh miadih tu ahebalay nu kilakilangan, miadih tu nika tahcelem nu cilal, pasabataden miadih tu makilitay a kayakay atu satalakaway nu Takaw walu a bataan idaw ku lima a satalakaway nu matatungduhay nu luma'.
S.PHON: maor~…ĺin (ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit: ***)a sakuwan ku kaońßsiuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺin-pan-ti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu paw-r~…ĺiw-ti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(*ukai) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u *ukai ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasa nijadu maor~…ĺin mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu * ku nijazu Ē~ °. tina tur~…ĺu a nijazu Ē~ °sa, t…ôr~…ĺdr…ôka , Ē~ °oponońßo , kuŇčada*an…ô . *** (maor~…ĺin)(*****:t…ôr~…ĺdr…ôka)u ¶unńßau-minkuo takaw nu ¶a ¶aja a s…ô ¶ia nijadu, itida i takaw war~…ĺi amisan nu paŇčkiw a papańßan nu war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan anijaduan, amisan miapi tu tawjun a nijaduan, nutipan sibijaw tu r~…ĺiwkuj nijaduan , tawan-s…ôn pindun-kin kawsu Ē~ °sin , war~…ĺijan sibijaw tu tawan-s…ôn tadun-kin inpin s…ôn , tmur~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu tawan-s…ôn pindun-kin sandi-min s…ôn , wutaj s…ôn . nijaduaj a tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku siwa (*.****) a tad…ômawan, u saadidiaj nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu s…ôsia nijadu Ē~ °an, u saadidiaj nu tawan subar~…ĺan nu saadidiaj a saka tur~…ĺu nu sin ¶…ôn nijadu Ē~ °. maor~…ĺin nijadu ńßan u ¶…ôsias…ô Ē~ ° nu juŇč ¶umin a kitidaan, idaw ku kunfu a tad…ômawan a siidaaj nu nijaduaj a kapur~…ĺuŇčan masakaputaj, isasa idaw ku wansan-r~…ĺi , duna-r~…ĺi , maur~…ĺin-r~…ĺi tur~…ĺu a nanijaduan . r~…ĺikisi maor~…ĺin nijaduan u tawan juŇč ¶umin r~…ĺukaj bina ¶adan wansan-s…ô , duna-s…ô , maja-s…ô a…ôn…ôŇčan anijaduan, amisan miapi tu mar~…ĺi buju a bunun nu bina ¶adan, war~…ĺijan miapi tu ir~…ĺabuaj nu p…ônr~…ĺu Ē~ ° bunun a bina ¶adan, timur~…ĺ ńßan u r~…ĺaja…ôa a bina ¶adan a pajwan bina ¶adan a nijaduan. mańß Ē~ °ka tajtajni ku dipun , nijaduaj a juŇč ¶umin ¶aaj pakaduŇčduŇč tu nipikuwan nu dipun , sisa mapur~…ĺuŇč ku nijaduaj a bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw pa ¶ur~…ĺi miwawi…ôs tu dipun , nika ami ¶a kuni kajadańß nu nipatajan tu kin ¶ar~…ĺ nu dipun , nika u bakan atu pana Ē~ ° ¶aaj tu pakad…ôm…ô ¶ tu si kuwaŇčaj a dipunan , ami ¶a kuni kasikuwan nu dipun , pajnijaduan a juŇč ¶imin pa ¶i ¶ian mikusaŇč. . nina kawaw paŇčaŇčanan nu dipun u "tun ¶…ôi" ńßan, u tun ¶…ôi a Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ u "duna" ńßan u nijaduaj a ŇčaŇčan. itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan a nijaduan misumad mibab…ônis pab…ôr~…ĺi tu takaw- ¶uo ¶isan a nijadu Ē~ ° anipikuwan. . ńß…ôd…ôk a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ujdaan tu ŇčaŇčan, patid…ôŇčsa tu duna nijadu Ē~ ° , i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan na masas…ôds…ôd tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu tawan a nipar~…ĺumaan tu kir~…ĺaŇč u sakakaaj ku ńß…ôni, ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku pitu (****) a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômian sumad…ôn mar~…ĺa maor~…ĺin-sin nijadu Ē~ ° , maja nijaduan tawja tu misumad tu maor~…ĺin nijadu Ē~ °ńßan . **********, . tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad s…ôpat a d…ômiad sa, maor~…ĺin nijadu Ē~ ° an tawja a mińß ¶aan tabaki ku nin…ôr~…ĺ …ôn…ôm tin s…ôpat ku sasur~…ĺitan nu nin…ôr~…ĺ, u takaw nikir~…ĺukan satabakija nu nin…ôr~…ĺan. (***tńßakoŇčada*an…ô,*** Ē~ °oponońßo,***t…ôr~…ĺdr…ôka), . nina nijaduaj a tad…ômaw u tawan juŇč ¶umin r~…ĺukaj bina ¶adan ku aŇčaŇčan. nika nina tur~…ĺuwaj a nijaduaj masasukamu ku ńß…ôni(***tńßakoŇčada*an…ô,*** Ē~ °oponońßo,***t…ôr~…ĺdr…ôka),nina r~…ĺukaj bina ¶adan nu tur~…ĺuaj a kamuan patudu Ē~ ° ńßan nu nijaduaj a sakar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kamuwan. idaw ku matatuŇčusaj a pakunida ńßananaj nu aidaŇčan, aaidaŇčan atu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, sińßu itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan sabuw tu tusa a bur~…ĺad patid…ôŇč tu tat…ôŇčaaj a maor~…ĺin kuo ¶iw aidaŇčan a katajdaan, mar~…ĺa tawan nu saka siŇčaŇčanaj a tatajdaan nu midaŇčaj. babańß…ôr~…ĺan nu kiwan a kur~…ĺitan nu aipapaŇč masir~…ĺsir~…ĺan\j nu nanum maor~…ĺin nijaduan itida i ¶unjan-sanmaj isasa Ē~ ° nu satimur~…ĺan, tar~…ĺakaw ńßan namaka tusa a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan (***) a kun ¶…ô katukuńß i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut pitu a r~…ĺasubu a pina (****) nu kun ¶…ô, d…ômiad nuńß…ôni ńßan ¶aaj kaw ¶ar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ…ôsaj a d…ômiad atu dińß…ôdińß…ôkuwan nu kar~…ĺa sapisapian a d…ômiad, ¶uko sawa ¶ ŇčaŇčiwŇčaŇčiw sa kunisir~…ĺsir~…ĺ pasajda i nijadu Ē~ ° kuni pisir~…ĺsir~…ĺan. . tar~…ĺakaw nu buju a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu aadińßan, pi ¶id…ôkan nu masa kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a …ônar~…ĺaj nu sasaaj a buju, nu maka pabawaj nikańß…ôtikan nu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ a ¶as ¶as mańßida ni p…ôr~…ĺaan nu kapi ¶id…ôkan a aadińßan tu aidaŇčan, jadańß ku aadupan atu mańßi ¶aaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, tan…ôŇč miadińß tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu …ômaŇčaj a kijukijuwan nu kur~…ĺitan a adipapaŇč itida i maor~…ĺin t…ôpadt…ôpadan nu masańßi ¶aaj a aadińßan tu dińß…ôp nu aadińßan. ńßamaw sa mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i aaidaŇčan, miadińß tu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu adipapaŇč a kitakit amir~…ĺakujtaj tu kasi…ônawan nu masadińß…ôpaj a mańßi ¶aaj nu adipapaŇč aadińßan, sisa maor~…ĺin aŇčaŇčan u r~…ĺukaj a bina ¶adan nu nijaduan. . tawjaaj a nakamuwan, pi ¶id…ôkan nu dińß…ôpi ¶aj a sasaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a ba Ē~ °tu, kapańßaj nar~…ĺimaan a nisaŇčaan, tar~…ĺakaw baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu mapa ¶a ¶ujaj nu kajakaj, masa kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan nu r~…ĺisin, nijaduaj a kakan…ôn, mi ¶unus tu nijaduaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu tatajdaan amidaŇč. aidaŇčan** ajdaaj nu maor~…ĺin kuo ¶iw aaidaŇčan ur~…ĺijud nida makatukuńß i takaw-s…ô tawjun kakitidaan, r~…ĺiwkuj kakitidaan , maor~…ĺin kakitidaan atu pindun-kin sandi-min-s…ôn , wu Ē~ °-taj-s…ôn , ma- ¶iw-s…ôn , nina …ôn…ôm a nijadu Ē~ °an, mańßi ¶aaj kja wajwaj nu kitidaan, wun ¶un a aaidaŇčan, u kapańß sa ¶abajan ku tad…ômaw nu jun ¶umin, nu masaka ¶aaj namiŇč kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kakawawan, nijadu Ē~ ° a wajwaj ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kakawaw. takaw pindun sawa ¶ nu pabawan r~…ĺaw-nun sawa ¶ , ¶uo-ko sawa ¶ ka sir~…ĺsir~…ĺan , mir~…ĺakujd tu takaw-s…ô r~…ĺiu-kuj kitidaan, maor~…ĺin kitidaan atu pin-tun kin santi-m…ôn nijadu Ē~ ° , ir~…ĺabu nu kitidaan idaw ku pawr~…ĺaj, pur~…ĺaw-wun ¶un, r~…ĺuntuo-san, s…ôtuo-san masaadiju ¶aj a masat…ôpadaj a …ônar~…ĺan nu kitidaan atu sabaw war~…ĺu a r~…ĺuońßan-santi dadiputan a nijaduan, duma satu idaw kunu r~…ĺukaj bina ¶adan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu nisaŇčaan tunu dińß…ôpi ¶aj a ba Ē~ °tu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu aadińßan tu mańßi ¶aaj a nisakakawan tu aadińßan atu r~…ĺiwkuj nikar~…ĺiwmańßan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu " r~…ĺinbu Ē~ ° maŇčgu, mar~…ĺasajadańßaj nu aaidaŇčan nu katajdaan. r~…ĺi-na-r~…ĺi aidaŇčan nu papar~…ĺitaan tu aadińßan u r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu aaidaŇčan idaw ku papar~…ĺitaan tu sapipadaŇč tu tajdaaj, tan…ôŇč miadińß tu ka ¶udu, papa ¶u ¶uwan tu r~…ĺutuŇčaj, aadińßan tu ¶udad atu tinnaw papa ¶u ¶ukan tu kainaian nu t…ôr~…ĺaj a diŇčwa nu papa ¶u ¶ukan. ****. nina kitidaan miadińß tu pintun u sańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a kitidaan, tajdaaj nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč tapabaw i saka tusa a tunduńß miadińß tu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, miadińß tu nika tańß ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôm nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, pasabatad…ôn miadińß tu makir~…ĺitaj a kajakaj atu satar~…ĺakawaj nu takaw war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a satar~…ĺakawaj nu matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °.
S.FORM: Maolin (Hulam a sulit: ŤĆāśěóŚćÄ)a sakuwan ku Kaohsiung. kumud nu kalesakan, 241.39 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 109.93 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 40.14 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 1,896 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 581 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 1,797 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakalatu 95%(Rukai) ku kasabinawlan. u Rukai ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasa niyadu Maolin mala 3 a cuwen atu 3 ku niyazu'. tina tulu a niyazu'sa, Teldreka , 'Oponoho , Kungadavane . ŤĆāśěóŚćÄ (Maolin)(ŤĆāśěóť≠ĮŚáĪŤ™ě:Teldreka)u Cunhau-minkuo Takaw nu cacaya a secia niyadu, itida i Takaw wali amisan nu pangkiw a papahan nu wali timulan aniyaduan, amisan miapi tu Tawyun a niyaduan, nutipan sibiyaw tu liwkuy niyaduan , Tawan-sen Pindun-kin Kawsu'sin , waliyan sibiyaw tu Tawan-sen Tadun-kin inpin sen , tmulan mitules tu Tawan-sen Pindun-kin Sandi-min sen , Wutay sen . niyaduay a tademaw cacay a malebut idaw ku siwa (1.9000) a tademawan, u saadidiay nu pulung nu Sesia niyadu'an, u saadidiay nu Tawan subalan nu saadidiay a saka tulu nu sincen niyadu'. Maolin niyadu han u cesiase' nu yungcumin a kitidaan, idaw ku kunfu a tademawan a siidaay nu niyaduay a kapulungan masakaputay, isasa idaw ku Wansan-li , Duna-li , Maulin-li tulu a naniyaduan . likisi Maolin niyaduan u Tawan yungcumin Lukay binacadan Wansan-se , Duna-se , Maya-se aenengan aniyaduan, amisan mIapi tu Mali buyu a Bunun nu binacadan, waliyan miapi tu ilabuay nu Penlu' Bunun a binacadan, timul han u Layaeya a binacadan a Paywan binacadan a niyaduan. mah'ka taytayni ku Dipun , niyaduay a yungcumin caay pakadungdung tu nipikuwan nu Dipun , sisa mapulung ku niyaduay a binacadan a tademaw paculi miwawies tu Dipun , nika amica kuni kayadah nu nipatayan tu kincal nu Dipun , nika u bakan atu pana' caay tu pakademec tu si kuwangay a Dipunan , amica kuni kasikuwan nu Dipun , payniyaduan a yungcimin pacician mikusang. . nina kawaw panganganan nu Dipun u "Tuncei" han, u Tuncei a ngalngal u "Duna" han u niyaduay a ngangan. itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan (1920) a mihcaan a niyaduan misumad mibabenis pabeli tu Takaw-cuo cisan a niyadu' anipikuwan. . hedek a malepacaw uydaan tu ngangan, patidengsa tu Duna niyadu' , i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihcaan na masasedsed tu pulung nu Tawan a nipalumaan tu kilang u sakakaay ku heni, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku pitu (1957) a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad cacay a demian sumaden mala Maolin-sin niyadu' , Maya niyaduan tawya tu misumad tu Maolin niyadu'han . 2010ŚĻī3śúą4śó•śôā, . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan tulu a bulad sepat a demiad sa, Maolin niyadu' an tawya a mihcaan tabaki ku ninel enem tin sepat ku sasulitan nu ninel, u Takaw nikilukan satabakiya nu ninelan. (Ś§öÁīćŤ™ěThakongadavane,Ťź¨ŚĪĪŤ™ě'Oponoho,ŤĆāśěóŤ™ěTeldreka), . nina niyaduay a tademaw u Tawan yungcumin Lukay binacadan ku angangan. nika nina tuluway a niyaduay masasukamu ku heni(Ś§öÁīćŤ™ěThakongadavane,Ťź¨ŚĪĪŤ™ě'Oponoho,ŤĆāśěóŤ™ěTeldreka),nina Lukay binacadan nu tuluay a kamuan patudu' han nu niyaduay a sakalalecad nu kamuwan. idaw ku matatungusay a pakunida hananay nu aidangan, aaidangan atu micidekay nu lalangawan, sihu itini i tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay (2001) a mihcaan sabuw tu tusa a bulad patideng tu tatengaay a Maolin kuociw aidangan a kataydaan, mala Tawan nu saka singanganay a tataydaan nu midangay. babahelan nu kiwan a kulitan nu aipapang masilsilan\y nu nanum Maolin niyaduan itida i Cunyan-sanmay isasa' nu satimulan, talakaw han namaka tusa a lasubu tulu a bataan (230) a kunce katukuh i tusa a malebut pitu a lasubu a pina (2700) nu kunce, demiad nuheni han caay kaw calelesay a demiad atu dihedihekuwan nu kala sapisapian a demiad, Cuko sawac ngangiwngangiw sa kunisilsil pasayda i niyadu' kuni pisilsilan. . talakaw nu buyu a bangcal nu aadihan, picidekan nu masa kimulmulay a enalay nu sasaay a buyu, nu maka pabaway nikahetikan nu silsil a cascas mahida ni pelaan nu kapicidekan a aadihan tu aidangan, yadah ku aadupan atu mahicaay nu kilangkilangan, taneng miadih tu cacay a bataan nu emangay a kiyukiyuwan nu kulitan a adipapang itida i Maolin tepadtepadan nu masahicaay a aadihan tu dihep nu aadihan. hamaw sa muculil i aaidangan, miadih tu mabahelay nu adipapang a kitakit amilakuytay tu kasienawan nu masadihepay a mahicaay nu adipapang aadihan, sisa Maolin angangan u Lukay a binacadan nu niyaduan. . tawyaay a nakamuwan, picidekan nu dihepicay a sasangaan tu luma' a ba'tu, kapahay nalimaan a nisangaan, talakaw bangcal nu mapacacuyay nu kayakay, masa kalimulakan nu lisin, niyaduay a kakanen, micunus tu niyaduay a lalangawan nu tataydaan amidang. aidanganŤßÄŚÖČ aydaay nu Maolin kuociw aaidangan uliyud nida makatukuh i Takaw-se Tawyun kakitidaan, Liwkuy kakitidaan , Maolin kakitidaan atu Pindun-kin Sandi-min-sen , Wu'-tay-sen , Ma-ciw-sen , nina enem a niyadu'an, mahicaay kya wayway nu kitidaan, Wuncun a aaidangan, u kapah sacabayan ku tademaw nu yuncumin, nu masaka caay naming kalecad nu kakawawan, niyadu' a wayway caay namin kalecad ku kakawaw. Takaw Pindun sawac nu pabawan Law-nun sawac , Cuo-ko sawac ka silsilan , milakuyd tu Takaw-se Liu-kuy kitidaan, Maolin kitidaan atu Pin-tun kin Santi-men niyadu' , ilabu nu kitidaan idaw ku Pawlay, Pulaw-wuncun, Luntuo-san, Setuo-san masaadiyucay a masatepaday a enalan nu kitidaan atu sabaw walu a Luohan-santi dadiputan a niyaduan, duma satu idaw kunu Lukay binacadan a lalangawan nu nisangaan tunu dihepicay a ba'tu nu luma' atu aadihan tu mahicaay a nisakakawan tu aadihan atu Liwkuy nikaliwmahan a nilaculan tu " linbu' manggu, malasayadahay nu aaidangan nu kataydaan. Li-na-li aidangan nu papalitaan tu aadihan u luma' nu aaidangan idaw ku papalitaan tu sapipadang tu taydaay, taneng miadih tu kacudu, papacucuwan tu lutungay, aadihan tu cudad atu tinnaw papacucukan tu kainaian nu telay a dingwa nu papacucukan. 85Ś§ßś®ď. nina kitidaan miadih tu Pintun u sahebalay nu bangcalay a kitidaan, taydaay nu midangay a tademaw taneng tapabaw i saka tusa a tunduh miadih tu ahebalay nu kilakilangan, miadih tu nika tahcelem nu cilal, pasabataden miadih tu makilitay a kayakay atu satalakaway nu Takaw walu a bataan idaw ku lima a satalakaway nu matatungduhay nu luma'.
S.PHON: maor~…ĺin (ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit: ***)a sakuwan ku kaońßsiuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺin-pan-ti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu paw-r~…ĺiw-ti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(*ukai) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u *ukai ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasa nijadu maor~…ĺin mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu * ku nijazu Ē~ °. tina tur~…ĺu a nijazu Ē~ °sa, t…ôr~…ĺdr…ôka , Ē~ °oponońßo , kuŇčada*an…ô . *** (maor~…ĺin)(*****:t…ôr~…ĺdr…ôka)u ¶unńßau-minkuo takaw nu ¶a ¶aja a s…ô ¶ia nijadu, itida i takaw war~…ĺi amisan nu paŇčkiw a papańßan nu war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan anijaduan, amisan miapi tu tawjun a nijaduan, nutipan sibijaw tu r~…ĺiwkuj nijaduan , tawan-s…ôn pindun-kin kawsu Ē~ °sin , war~…ĺijan sibijaw tu tawan-s…ôn tadun-kin inpin s…ôn , tmur~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu tawan-s…ôn pindun-kin sandi-min s…ôn , wutaj s…ôn . nijaduaj a tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku siwa (*.****) a tad…ômawan, u saadidiaj bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw pa ¶ur~…ĺi miwawi…ôs tu dipun , nika ami ¶a kuni kajadańß nu nipatajan tu kin ¶ar~…ĺ nu dipun , nika u bakan atu pana Ē~ ° ¶aaj tu pakad…ôm…ô ¶ tu si kuwaŇčaj a dipunan , ami ¶a t…ôpadt…ôpadan nu masańßi ¶aaj a aadińßan tu dińß…ôp nu aadińßan. ńßamaw sa mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i aaidaŇčan, miadińß tu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu adipapaŇč a kitakit amir~…ĺakujtaj tu kasi…ônawan nu masadińß…ôpaj aidaŇčan** ajdaaj nu maor~…ĺin kuo ¶iw aaidaŇčan ur~…ĺijud nida makatukuńß i takaw-s…ô tawjun kakitidaan, r~…ĺiwkuj kakitidaan , maor~…ĺin kakitidaan atu pindun-kin sandi-min-s…ôn , wu Ē~ °-taj-s…ôn , nijadu Ē~ ° a wajwaj ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kakawaw. takaw pindun sawa ¶ nu pabawan r~…ĺaw-nun sawa ¶ , ¶uo-ko sawa ¶ ka sir~…ĺsir~…ĺan , mir~…ĺakujd tu takaw-s…ô r~…ĺiu-kuj kitidaan, maor~…ĺin a diŇčwa nu papa ¶u ¶ukan. ****. nina kitidaan miadińß tu pintun u sańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a kitidaan, tajdaaj nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč tapabaw i saka tusa a tunduńß miadińß tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °.
